---
title: "Publications"
---

## Published papers

::: {.pub-list}

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-abbr}
SPA
:::
::: {.pub-body}
::: {.pub-title}
Central limit theory for Peaks-over-Threshold partial sums of long memory linear time series
:::

::: {.pub-authors}
Ioan Scheffel, Marco Oesting, Gilles Stupfler
:::

::: {.pub-venue}
*Stochastic Processes and their Applications* **197** (2026), Article 104929
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.spa.2026.104929){.pub-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.20789){.pub-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.11434){.pub-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::
:::

:::

## Preprints

::: {.pub-list}

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-abbr}
arXiv
:::
::: {.pub-body}
::: {.pub-title}
Maxima of stationary systems of randomly time-changed Lévy particles
:::

::: {.pub-authors}
Ioan Scheffel
:::

::: {.pub-venue}
*arXiv preprint*, 2026
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11434){.pub-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.11434){.pub-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::
:::

:::
